mapper.select:
SELECT a.id,
CONCAT(c.brand,"-",b.vehicle_model,"-",d.functional_domain_name) name, a.title,
CONCAT(c.brand_en,"-",b.vehicle_model,"-",d.functional_domain_name_en) name, a.title_en title,
a.url_name, a.file_type, a.type FROM `vehicle_function_domain_video` a left JOIN vehicle_base_info b on b.id = a.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_brand c on b.brand_id = c.id LEFT JOIN vehicle_functional_domain d on d.id = a.function_domain_id where a.type = #{i} and a.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} and a.status != 0 ORDER BY a.id

SELECT a.id,
CONCAT(c.brand,"-",b.vehicle_model,"-",d.functional_domain_name) name, a.title,
CONCAT(c.brand_en,"-",b.vehicle_model,"-",d.functional_domain_name_en) name, a.title_en title,
a.url_name, a.file_type, a.type FROM `vehicle_function_domain_video` a left JOIN vehicle_base_info b on b.id = a.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_brand c on b.brand_id = c.id LEFT JOIN vehicle_functional_domain d on d.id = a.function_domain_id where a.type = #{i} and a.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} and a.status != 0 ORDER BY a.id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT SUBSTR(url_name, 1, LENGTH(url_name) - 18) number,id FROM vehicle_function_domain_video WHERE function_domain_id = #{functionDomainId} AND vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} and file_type = 0;

SELECT a.id,
CONCAT(c.brand,"-",b.vehicle_model) name, d.functional_domain_name functionalDomain, e.index_name threeTag, a.title, a.description, a.task_type,
CONCAT(c.brand_en,"-",b.vehicle_model) name, d.functional_domain_name_en functionalDomain, e.index_name_en threeTag, a.title_en title, a.description_en description, a.task_type_en taskType,
a.url_name videoUrl, a.file_type, a.type FROM `vehicle_function_domain_video` a left JOIN vehicle_base_info b on b.id = a.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_domain_index e on a.function_domain_index_id = e.id left join vehicle_brand c on b.brand_id = c.id LEFT JOIN vehicle_functional_domain d on d.id = a.function_domain_id where a.type = #{i} and a.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} ORDER BY a.id

SELECT a.id,
CONCAT(c.brand,"-",b.vehicle_model) name, d.functional_domain_name functionalDomain, e.index_name threeTag, a.title, a.description, a.task_type,
CONCAT(c.brand_en,"-",b.vehicle_model) name, d.functional_domain_name_en functionalDomain, e.index_name_en threeTag, a.title_en title, a.description_en description, a.task_type_en taskType,
a.url_name videoUrl, a.file_type, a.type FROM `vehicle_function_domain_video` a left JOIN vehicle_base_info b on b.id = a.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_domain_index e on a.function_domain_index_id = e.id left join vehicle_brand c on b.brand_id = c.id LEFT JOIN vehicle_functional_domain d on d.id = a.function_domain_id where a.type = #{i} and a.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} ORDER BY a.id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
